title: Recolourful Containers + Supplementaries Compatibility Pack
description: Adds Recolourful Containers style textures to the Supplementary mod
body:
I was unhappy that Supplementaries was left out of Recolourful Containers so I made the textures myself!



Here's some of the textures done in the pack:

![The Cannon GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcbaba28d9bd950e1ee218856d4992601e789602.png)
![The Present GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc7984ebbb1c1ce4accf496fe89142d303c48006.png)
![The Red Merchant GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e15a71d4ae42678214d066c090a44f9b62e10fd.png)

Only has been tested for Supplementaries version 1.21.1-3.6.4 I do not know if it works with older versions but give it a shot if you want. I'll do some of my own testing when I get some more time.



Dark mode version is planned but not completed yet.



Todo's:
- Figure out how the heck to remove the text from each GUI
- Red Merchant Variations (Orange, Santa)
- GUI animations for the Red Merchant (and variations)****



Aight that's bout it ty for downloading :3
